display.name: Idiot - Star Of Annon
display.author: Idiot
display.blurb: Stellar bursts radiate outward from a brilliant central star.

annotation.technical_notes: A high-exposure central core is driven by aggressive brighten and gamma settings, creating a high-contrast bloom. The per-pixel warp shader applies a swirling vortex motion, accumulating in sampler_main with a low decay rate to form fluid, metallic-looking concentric bands. Discrete rectangular custom shapes are triggered as beat bursts by the audio's bass peaks, scaling rapidly outward before dissolving into the feedback loop.
